name: Apple Cloud Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 cups grated peeled apple (about 2 large apples)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Generously oil a 9-inch square pan and dust with flour.
2. Place the egg whites in a large bowl. Beat with an electric mixer at high speed until they form sturdy peaks.
3. In another large bowl, combine the grated apple, lemon juice, sugar, cinnamon, vanilla extract, sifted flour, salt, optional nuts, and cranberries. Mix well.
4. Using a rubber spatula, fold the beaten egg whites into the apple mixture until fairly well combined. Transfer to the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 30 minutes, or until a probe inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow cooling before slicing. Serve plain or dusted with powdered sugar.
